get.description:
Get all platform providers (PP) without pagination

Returns a list of all platform providers where type = 'pp' with basic information including:
- ID
- Status
- Business name
- Currency

Note: Filters out service providers (type = 'sp') from the same table

Get all roles with pagination and optional search

- **page**: Page number (starts from 1)
- **limit**: Number of items per page (max 100)
- **search**: Search string for filtering role names

Get all users with pagination

- **page**: Page number (starts from 1)
- **limit**: Number of items per page (max 100)
- **sort_by**: Field to sort by (created_timestamp, user_name)
- **sort_order**: Sort direction (asc or desc)

Search users with filters and pagination

- **q**: General search query (searches across username, email, first name, last name)
- **username**: Exact username match
- **email**: Exact email match
- **first_name**: First name filter
- **last_name**: Last name filter
- **type**: Entity type filter (sys, pp, sp, merchant)
- **status**: Status filter (active, suspend)
- **enabled**: Keycloak enabled status filter
- **page**: Page number (starts from 1)
- **limit**: Number of items per page (max 100)

parameters.name: q

schema.description: General search query (searches username, email, first/last name)
schema.title: Q

parameters.description: General search query (searches username, email, first/last name)

parameters.name: type

schema.description: Entity type filter (sys, pp, sp, merchant)
schema.title: Type

parameters.description: Entity type filter (sys, pp, sp, merchant)

get.description:
Get all service providers for a specific payment processor with pagination and optional search

- **pp_id**: Payment processor ID
- **page**: Page number (starts from 1)
- **limit**: Number of items per page (max 100)
- **search**: Search string for filtering business names or user IDs

parameters.name: search

schema.description: Search string for business names or user IDs
schema.title: Search

parameters.description: Search string for business names or user IDs

- **page**: Page number (starts from 1)
- **limit**: Number of items per page (max 100)
- **search**: Search string for filtering country names or codes

parameters.name: search

schema.description: Search string for country names or codes
schema.title: Search

parameters.description: Search string for country names or codes

get.description:
Get all currencies with pagination and optional search

- **page**: Page number (starts from 1)
- **limit**: Number of items per page (max 100)
- **search**: Search string for filtering currency codes

Get all connectors without pagination

Returns a list of all connectors with complete information including:
- ID
- Name
- Upstream name
- URL
- Protocol
- Security
- API key
- Host MID
- Status

Get all fees without pagination

Returns a list of all fees with complete information including:
- ID
- Status
- Rate type (transaction/commission)
- Rate method (fixed/percentage/slab)
- Entity type
- Transaction type
- Value (slab details)

Get all routes without pagination

Returns a list of all routes with complete information including:
- ID
- Route type (bin/tpdu/currency/default)
- Associated bin list (for bin routes)
- Associated tpdu list (for tpdu routes) 
- Associated currency/country list (for currency routes)

Get merchants for a specific service provider with pagination and optional search

Returns a paginated list of merchants with essential information including:
- ID
- Status
- Business name
- Industry
- Bank MID
- Settlement type and period
- Currency

Supports search across:
- Business name
- Industry
- Bank MID
- User ID

parameters.name: search

schema.description: Search by business name, industry, bank MID, or user ID
schema.title: Search

parameters.description: Search by business name, industry, bank MID, or user ID

get.description:
Get all merchants for a specific service provider without pagination

Returns a list of all merchants with essential information including:
- ID
- Status
- Business name
- Industry
- Bank MID
- Settlement type and period
- Currency

Get all API keys for a specific service provider without pagination

Returns a list of all API keys with information including:
- ID
- Status
- Parent ID (SP ID)
- Key value
